title: Neoadjuvant Immunotherapy With Ipilimumab Plus Nivolumab in Mismatch Repair Deficient/Microsatellite Instability-High Colorectal Cancer: A Preliminary Report of Case Series.
abstract: Although ipilimumab plus nivolumab have significantly improved the survival of metastatic colorectal cancer (CRC) with mismatch repair deficient (dMMR) /microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H), the data on neoadjuvant setting is limited.
trial_name: Nivolumab in patients with metastatic DNA mismatch repair-deficient/microsatellite instability-high colorectal cancer
